children.heading: Rules of procedure for binational panels
children.label: a Rules of procedure for binational panels

children.text: requests for such reviews, complaints, other pleadings, and other papers;
the amendment, filing, and service of such pleadings and papers;
the joinder, suspension, and termination of such reviews; and

children.heading: Rules of procedure for extraordinary challenge committees
children.label: b Rules of procedure for extraordinary challenge committees
children.text: The administering authority shall prescribe rules, negotiated in accordance with paragraph 2 of Annex 10–B.3, governing the procedures for reviews by extraordinary challenge committees.

children.heading: Rules of procedure for safeguarding panel review system
children.label: c Rules of procedure for safeguarding panel review system
children.text: The administering authority shall prescribe rules, negotiated in accordance with Annex 10–B.4, governing the procedures for special committees described in such Annex.

children.heading: Publication of rules
children.label: d Publication of rules
children.text: The rules prescribed under subsections (a), (b), and (c) shall be published in the Federal Register.

children.heading: Administering authority
children.label: e Administering authority
children.text: As used in this section, the term “administering authority” has the meaning given such term in .section 1677(1) of this title
